reviews.review_description: Wow just wow Love this game so much almost perfect I love the wild West But the bugs kinda annoy for starts when I reload and the pull the hammer back it deleted a bullet from the cylinder, 2 my hat doesn't go back on (or I just don't know how) 3 so I beat the sheriff and 1st guy but the third guy big dog keeps saying I'm a cheater and I can't get past him BTW it would be cool if there's skins for guns or something, but this is now my favorite game
Very well made for a free pandemic production, I know I'd pay for a longer sequel.  The alternate voice lines depending on how you did was a nice touch.

I think the way they inserted video of real people instead of computer-animated or bad cartoon graphics, is the wave of the future for VR. 

It is a little "cheesy" (acting) but that makes it more fun!  If the developers took their video insert idea and really spent some time and money this game and others like it could be GREAT! 

I have never been able to actually take out "Mad Dog" so I don't know what comes after the first gun battle, but I am looking forward to it.

reviews.review_title: This could be a way better game
reviews.review_description: I would like to say that the sheriffs are laggy I like what I like how they recorded the developer as all the sheriffs but that just gives the game extra lag and when I shoot from a far distance the sheriff doesn’t die it’s kind of impossible to complete sorry but this game does have potential￼

reviews.review_title: Not bad backgrounds should be FMV

reviews.review_description:
Very simple game.
You walk around a wild West town, meeting cheesy actors one by one, then having a shootout.
It's really fun and addictive. I really like this game
😂🤣 I dont know why I like it, but I do 🤣😂
Fun game but I found it difficult  to reload  I played the original   you just aimed at floor to reload  till this is fixed  not be playing
It was a short experience but oh boy i loved it ! You got everything right, acting is on point and makes the game so fun. Can't wait for MADDOG 2022 !
Idk why but I keep replaying this game
Though a touch off and a bit buggy, it is fun to actually quickdraw and hipfire. Well done you all! Cant wait for Mad Dog 22
Makes me feel a way that I cannot describe, maybe nostalgia?
Probably the best game I've ever played, not only on vr but ever.

i love the marty robins references in this, with the highway man music, super cool!  i love the fastest draw also. the biggest issues are that for my quest the graphics are not as cool as in the clip.  but i do enjoy the challenge.  its also hard to see where the shot that keeps getting me is coming from, but snaps for goin against the grain with this idea. fine tuned, and this will elevate the star count. 
yes i had to play it quite a few times before i made much progress, but im chalking it up to difficulty. (hopefully)  
if u like the old west, def give this game the work it desrves

once you take out maddog, his kin folk come after ya, sherriff and all....
Very quick game. Pretty cool for a western fan. Game feels a little non complete. Can't complain for a free game. The saloon is the same saloon as it is in walk about mini golf lol

Remember those motion video light gun arcade games in the late 80s early 90s? This totally gives me the same vibes. Only difference is, you gotta do it standing up, cos you'll need to look behind you too. For a free game, it's a hellalotta fun!
This is quite literally the best vr game I’ve ever played I hope to see more games like it
